creator: jakub_lach@mailplus.pl
text:
(In reply to Niclas Zeising from comment #9)

drm-kmod does not support GM45, last time I've checked. Tried LIBGL_DRI3_DISABLE already, no difference. 

Since before update everything was fine, I think that maybe meson build configures something differently (at first it wanted disabled wayland, but this is already fixed).
